<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:男色]][[nl:Nanshoku]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:男色]][[nl:Nanshoku]]
{{Expand Japanese|男色|date=November 2025}}
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:男色]][[nl:Nanshoku]]


Nanshoku is a Japanese word referring to traditional homosexuality.<ref>[https://discover-japan.info/history-of-homosexuality-in-japan/ History of homosexuality in Japan - Discover Japan]</ref>
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Pederasty|en|Pederasty|WD=Q211354|lt=Pederasty|1=Pederasty}} - {{ill|beautiful youth|ja|美少|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/beautiful youth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|child|ja|稚児|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/child|1=Chigo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30940647}}
* {{ill|pederasty|ja|衆道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/pederasty|1=shudō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1368546}}
* {{ill|Male prostitution|en|Male prostitution|WD=Q1261491|lt=male prostitute|1=Male prostitution}} - {{ill|Wakashū|en|Wakashū|WD=Q133917|lt=young men|1=Wakashū}} - {{ill|Kagema|en|Kagema|WD=Q153413|lt=effeminate man|1=Kagema}}
* {{ill|page|ja|小姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/page|1=Koshō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10314648}} - {{ill|sandal-bearer|ja|小草履取り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sandal-bearer|1=sandal bearer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463518}}
* {{ill|Lord Longyang|en|Lord Longyang|WD=Q11181863|lt=Ryūyō-kun|1=Lord Longyang}} - {{ill|Mizi Xia|en|Mizi Xia|WD=Q6136746|lt=Yashiko|1=Mizi Xia}} - {{ill|Dong Xian|en|Dong Xian|WD=Q3274909|lt=Dong Xian|1=Dong Xian}}
* {{ill|male love literature|ja|男色物|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/male love literature|1=male love literature|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690425}}

== References ==
<references />{{LGBT-stub}}
{{LGBT}}
{{translated page|ja|男色|version=102069732|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[nl:Nanshoku]]
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[ja:男色]]
{{wikidata link|Q122663390}}
[[Category:Male homosexuality]]
[[Category:Sexual acts]]
[[Category:Shudō]]
[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
